features.name: struct type definition with integer fields
features.description: Code should include a typedef struct containing two int fields named 'a' and 'b'

features.name: variable declaration of struct type
features.description: Code should include a variable declaration using a previously defined struct type

features.name: struct literal with positional fields
features.description: Code should include a struct literal assignment using positional field values in an initial procedure

features.name: struct literal with default keyword
features.description: Code should include a struct literal assignment using the 'default:' keyword to set default values

features.name: struct literal with type-qualified field names
features.description: Code should include a struct literal assignment using type-qualified field names (e.g., int:0)
